verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'll fly away, oh glory, I'll fly away; when I'm gone Hallelujah by and by, I'll fly away.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm going up, I'm going up I'm going up in the first resurrection. I'm going up, I'm going up I'm going up to meet the Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We're all going up, We're all going up We're all going up in the first resurrection. We're all going up, We're all going up We're all going up, Oh, praise the Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There'll be coming from the East, There'll be coming from the West, There'll be coming from the North, There'll be coming from the South.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We're all going up, We're all going up We're all going up, Oh, praise the Lord.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: In that city where the Lamb is the light, The city where there cometh no night; I've a mansion over there, and when free from toil and care, I am going where the Lamb is the light.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I'm going home, On the road home. Going back to God where I belong. Heaven and earth will embrace, Glory to God! I'll see His face! I'm going back to God Where I belong.
